long_description:
we need to restart the vm-scheduler in DAL staging us-south-2 so that the new kube-define annotations are propagated
Incident source: Reported by Dev Team - Priya Rao

command to restart vm-scheduler
```
kubectl rollout restart deploy vm-scheduler -n genctl
```
short_description: new kube-define annotations not propagated to vm-scheduler
